title: Infinite Trading
description: Infinite Trading lets server OPs grant specific players unlimited, lock-free villager trades via command. It features real-time UI syncing, persistent storage, and full server/singleplayer support.
body:
## 💎 Infinite Trading

Control your server's economy by granting specific players infinite villager trades. No more "Sold Out" messages or price hikes.

---

### 🚀 Key Features

* **Per-Player Control:** Grant infinite status via commands (ideal for OPs/VIPs).
* **No Trade Locks:** Villager and Wandering Trader offers never lock up.
* **Price Reset:** Automatically clears **Demand** and **Special Price** spikes.
* **Instant Fix:** Reopening a trade menu instantly unlocks existing "Sold Out" trades.
* **Persistent:** Data saves to the world folder; persists through restarts.

### 🎮 Commands

* `/inftrade enable <player>` — Enable infinite trading.
* `/inftrade disable <player>` — Return to vanilla limits.

### 🛠 Compatibility

* **Server-Side:** logic runs on the server; clients don't *need* the mod to join.
* **Singleplayer:** Works perfectly fine in Singleplayer.
* **Vanilla Friendly:** Safe to add/remove; no new items or blocks.
